etymology.description: 艸(艸) (cǎo, "grass; plant") + 合(合) (hé, "combine") = plant-based component with sound of 合 -> reply; respond
etymology.interpretation: 荅 (dá, "reply") combines the semantic component 艸(艸) indicating something plant-related, with 合(合) providing the phonetic sound, suggesting how the character conveys the concept of answering or responding, possibly rooted in the idea of correspondence or connection.
